title: Transform Corporate Training with Skydeck: Elevate Offerings and Embrace GenAI
description: Empower corporate trainers with Skydeck's AI tools to enhance training programs. Join leaders like VISA in offering high-value experiences. Get 3 months free access to Skydeck.ai and expand into the GenAI space. Sign up today!
h1: Expert AI Tools That Clients Use Daily
lede: Create custom tools that put your consulting methods into practice. Build them yourself or let our team create them with you.
html:
GROW YOUR CONSULTING BUSINESS

Package Your Methods Into Interactive Tools That Get Results

Sell more premium programs by adding practical tools your clients will value and use.

  • Give clients tools they can use between sessions
  • Add new revenue streams to your existing business
  • Win new business with AI-enhanced offerings

COLLABORATION WORKSPACE

Boost Collaboration and Communication with Skydeck

Enhance teamwork and interaction with Skydeck's collaboration features. Create a seamless experience for trainers and their learners.

  • Create Workspaces — Set up dedicated spaces for your training sessions. You can tailor which tools each learner can access.
  • Invite Participants — Bring students into the workspace to collaborate effectively.
  • Engage with AI — Chat with AI, switch AI models like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude an more easily, and enhance learning.
  • Share Insights — Create snapshots of conversations to share publicly. Anyone can access without having to log in. Sharer can even see analytics insights from snapshot sharing like View, Click.
  • Increase Collaboration — Allow participants to invite others, tag names, and enhance communication.

SMART TOOLS FOR EVERY INDUSTRY

Empower Learners with Industry-Specific Tools

Skydeck offers a variety of smart tools tailored to the needs of learners across different industries, whether they are coding, accounting, designing, or copywriting.

  • Eliminate Mundane Tasks: Use built-in tools to automate repetitive tasks, saving time and increasing efficiency.
  • Custom Tool Creation: Develop your own tools tailored to specific needs, enhancing productivity.
  • Scheduled Communications: Schedule AI conversations to be sent automatically to Slack, email, and more, just like traditional email scheduling.

EFFICIENTLY OVERSEE YOUR CLIENTELE

Client Management Simplified

Skydeck’s intuitive dashboard simplifies client management, allowing you to focus on delivering exceptional training.

  • Centralized Client Oversight — Manage all your clients from a single, easy-to-use interface, streamlining your operations.
  • Flexible Resource Allocation — Transfer seats between clients with ease, adapting to changing needs.
  • Comprehensive Analytics — Monitor billing and usage statistics to optimize your services and maintain transparency.

Get started
